metadata.description: Dev server backed by the preseeded demo repos in backend/demo.py. DEMO_MODE=1 bypasses DATABASE_URL entirely so dev works offline without hitting prod PostgreSQL.

options.command: (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true) && DEMO_MODE=1 DATABASE_URL= uv run --package agentbook uvicorn backend.main:app --reload

metadata.description: Dev server that reads DATABASE_URL from root .env (use only when you need the real DB — Railway prod or a local Postgres).

options.command: (lsof -ti:8000 | xargs kill 2>/dev/null || true) && uv run --package agentbook uvicorn backend.main:app --reload
